import sys, json
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
recent = d.get\('filings',{}\).get\('recent',{}\)
forms = recent.get\('form',[]\)
accessions = recent.get\('accessionNumber',[]\)
dates = recent.get\('filingDate',[]\)
for i,f in enumerate\(forms[:5]\):
    if f == 'ABS-EE':
        print\(f'{f} | {dates[i]} | {accessions[i]}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(.venv/bin/python3 -c "
import asyncio
async def main\(\):
    from nli_cmbs.db.session import async_session_factory
    from sqlalchemy import delete
    from nli_cmbs.db.models import CikMapping
    async with async_session_factory\(\) as session:
        result = await session.execute\(
            delete\(CikMapping\).where\(CikMapping.deal_ticker == 'BMARK 2024-V6'\)
        \)
        await session.commit\(\)
        print\(f'Deleted {result.rowcount} cached entry'\)
asyncio.run\(main\(\)\)
" 2>&1)
